zh.Cust Hall, Essex, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭艾可庫斯特 霍爾
zh.Toro, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spain: 西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉托羅
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Angelica Sánchez於1280年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩莫拉托羅。她於1299年與Robert Wyatt Crochrode結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1331年在英國艾可格斯費爾德享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sánchez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Miguel, Jorge, Pedro, Ramon, Raul, Roberto.
Spanish (Sánchez): patronymic from the personal name Sancho . In the US, this surname is also found among Native Americans (mainly Pueblos). Compare De Sanchez .

variants.name: Saez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Diego, Jorge, Juan, Carlos, Enrique, Miguel, Pedro, Rafael, Guillermo, Jaime.

variants.name: Sancho
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Elena, Carlos, Fernando, Jacinto, Mario, Agustin, Ana, Dulce, Emilio, Enrique, Eugenio.

Spanish and Portuguese: from Sancho, a popular medieval personal name, which is probably from Latin Sanc(t)ius, a derivative of sanctus ‘holy’. The personal name was borne by a 9th-century Christian martyr of Cordova.

variants.name: Saenz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Raul, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Mario, Francisco, Pedro, Ricardo, Alfredo.

variants.name: Sanz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Ricardo, Juan, Luis, Enrique, Jaime, Armando, Ernesto, Francisco, Manuel, Miguel.
German: from a short form, Sando, of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with sand ‘true’.
German: habitational name from a place called Sanz in Mecklenburg-West Pomerania.

nameMeanings.name: Angelica
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Church Latin, from the feminine form of the Latin adjective angelicus ‘angelic’, or simply a Latinate elaboration of Angela .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Angelica Sánchez was born in 1280, in Toro, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spain. She married Robert Wyatt Crochrode in 1299. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1331, in Gosfield, Essex, England, at the age of 51.

ko.Toro, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spain: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 자모라 토로
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Angelica Sánchez(은)는 1280년 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 자모라 토로에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1299년 Robert Wyatt Crochrode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1331년 영국 에세스 고스필드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Angelica Sánchez родилась в 1280 г. в местности торо, замора, кастилла и леoн, Испания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Wyatt Crochrode в 1299 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1331 г. в местности госфиелд, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 51 год.
